steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content:
Both equations are in slope-intercept form.
$$
y=2x+10
$$
$$
y=2x-1
$$
They have the same slope, $2$, but different $y$-intercepts.

steps.title: Count the intersections
steps.content: Lines with the same slope and different intercepts are parallel, so they never intersect. The answer is A.
